data.body: Evidence for the two remaining ACs. (1) Per-child Gerrit changes, each MERGED with LLM-Review +1 AND Verified +1 (vote history at each URL): d156/curly-mild-chupacabra -> change 700 (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/700); 67da/medium-monogamous-dotterel -> change 701 (/c/rebar/+/701); 5e64/citric-alert-dogfish -> change 706 (/c/rebar/+/706); a850/giddying-teenytiny-mare -> change 707 (/c/rebar/+/707); 8086/petit-cordial-kudu -> change 708 (/c/rebar/+/708). Submits were only possible at both votes +1 (the DefaultSubmitRule); 700/701 were submitted 2026-07-15 ~06:23Z, 706 ~08:0xZ, 707+708 ~09:5xZ (707 landed via 708's stacked submit). Child 0730/enervated-snoozy-needletail is analysis-only (empty file_impact; no change to land). (2) Suite state after the FINAL child landed: 707 (a850) and 708 (8086) landed atomically as one stack - change 708's tree sits directly on 707's commit, so 708's Verified +1 (CI build/test/lint/typecheck on GitHub Actions) certifies the full post-a850 tree, i.e. exactly the code state that became main at submit; the ADR-0047 post-merge main CI on the GitHub mirror push is the standing safety net on the merged result. Local confirmation from the synced worktree at the merged tip (52d7a3dc1): make lint clean (1022 files formatted), make typecheck 'Success: no issues found in 326 source files', focused suites 151 passed.
